---
title: "Longitudinal exploration of cars"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(haven)
library(tidyverse)
library(skimr)
library(corrplot)
library(scales)
library(ggthemes)
library(kableExtra)

current_dir <- getwd()
source(file.path(current_dir,"src","R","utils.R"))

years <- c(2016, 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2023, 2025)

waves <- list()

data_path <- "/home/amy/tmp/sheds_data/files/SHEDS"

waves <- list()
for (year in years) {
  file_path <- paste0("/home/amy/tmp/sheds_data/files/SHEDS", year, ".sav")
  wave_name <- as.character(year)
  waves[[wave_name]] <- read_clean_sheds(file_path)
}

all_ids <- waves %>%
  map_df(~ select(.x, id)) %>%
  pull(id) %>%
  unique()

cat("\nTotal unique IDs across all waves:", length(all_ids), "\n")

cat("\n=== Summary ===\n")
cat("Total respondents (all waves):", sum(map_int(waves, nrow)), "\n")
cat("Total unique IDs:", length(all_ids), "\n")
cat("Duplicate appearances:", sum(map_int(waves, nrow)) - length(all_ids), "\n")

id_counts <- waves %>%
  map_df(~ select(.x, id), .id = "wave") %>%
  count(id) %>%
  arrange(desc(n))

cat("\nDistribution of appearances:\n")
print(table(id_counts$n))
```

EV ownership over time using md_708 and history building:
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(knitr)

md_708_summary <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(waves), function(wave_name) {
    df <- waves[[wave_name]]
    tibble(
      year              = as.integer(wave_name),
      n_total           = nrow(df),
      n_population      = if ("md_hhgr" %in% names(df)) sum(df$md_hhgr[df$mob2_1 >= 1 & df$mob2_1 < 90], na.rm = TRUE) else NA_integer_,
      n_car_owners_md220 = if ("md_220" %in% names(df)) sum(as.numeric(df$md_220) >= 1 & as.numeric(df$md_220) < 90, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_integer_,
      n_ev_md708        = if ("md_708" %in% names(df)) sum(df$md_708 == 1, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_integer_,
      n_ev_missing      = if ("md_708" %in% names(df)) sum(is.na(df$md_708)) else NA_integer_,
      ev_rate_md708     = n_ev_md708 / n_total,
      ev_rate_car_owners = n_ev_md708 / n_car_owners_md220
    )
  })
) %>%
  filter(year %in% c(2019, 2020, 2021, 2023, 2025))

md_708_summary %>%
  mutate(
    ev_rate_md708      = percent(ev_rate_md708,      accuracy = 0.01),
    ev_rate_car_owners = percent(ev_rate_car_owners, accuracy = 0.01)
  ) %>%
  kable(
    col.names  = c("Year", "N Total", "N Pop.", "N Car Owners (md_220)",
                   "N EV (md_708)", "N Missing", "EV Rate (all)", "EV Rate (car owners)"),
    align       = "r",
    format.args = list(big.mark = ",")
  ) %>%
  print()

stata_car_history <- build_car_history_stata(waves)


results_stata <- bind_rows(
  analyze_ev_ownership_data(stata_car_history, 2019, waves),
  analyze_ev_ownership_data(stata_car_history, 2020, waves ),
  analyze_ev_ownership_data(stata_car_history, 2021, waves),
  analyze_ev_ownership_data(stata_car_history, 2023, waves),
  analyze_ev_ownership_data(stata_car_history, 2025, waves)
)

results_stata %>%
  select(year, n_total, n_car_owner_population, n_car_owners, n_ev_main, n_ev_secondary,
         n_ev_total, n_hybrid_gas, n_hybrid_diesel, ev_rate_car_owners, n_car_owners_inter) %>%
  mutate(ev_rate_car_owners = percent(ev_rate_car_owners, accuracy = 0.01)) %>%
  kable(
    col.names = c("Year", "N", "Pop.", "Car Own.", "EV Main", "EV 2nd",
                  "EV Total", "Hybrid Gas", "Hybrid Dies.", "EV Rate car owners", "N car owners inter"),
    align = "r",
    format.args = list(big.mark = ",")
  ) %>%
  print()
```

Prepare data to be compared with FSO:
```{r}
# SHEDS md_708: divide by n_car_owners
# sheds_md708_pop <- md_708_summary %>%
#  filter(year %in% c(2019, 2020, 2021, 2023, 2025)) %>%
#  left_join(results_stata %>% select(year, n_car_owners), by = "year") %>%
#  mutate(
#    percentage = (n_ev_md708 / n_car_owners) * 100,
#    type       = "Pure Electric",
#    source     = "SHEDS (md_708)"
#  ) %>%
#  select(year, type, percentage, source)

sheds_md708_pop <- md_708_summary %>%
  filter(year %in% c(2019, 2020, 2021, 2023, 2025)) %>%
  mutate(
    percentage = (n_ev_md708 / n_car_owners_md220) * 100,
    type       = "Pure Electric",
    source     = "SHEDS (md_708)"
  ) %>%
  select(year, type, percentage, source)

# SHEDS history: divide by n_car_owners, include hybrids
sheds_history_pop <- results_stata %>%
  filter(year %in% c(2019, 2020, 2021, 2023, 2025)) %>%
  mutate(n_hybrid_total = n_hybrid_gas + n_hybrid_diesel) %>%
  select(year, n_ev_main, n_ev_secondary, n_hybrid_total, n_car_owners) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(n_ev_main, n_ev_secondary, n_hybrid_total),
               names_to = "type", values_to = "count") %>%
  mutate(
    percentage = (count / n_car_owners) * 100,
    type       = recode(type,
                        "n_ev_main"      = "Pure Electric (Main)",
                        "n_ev_secondary" = "Pure Electric (Secondary)",
                        "n_hybrid_total" = "Hybrid"),
    source     = "SHEDS (History)"
  ) %>%
  select(year, type, percentage, source)

print(sheds_md708_pop)
print(sheds_history_pop)
```

Old BFS file:
```{r}
bfs_percentage <- read_csv("/home/amy/tmp/repos/sheds_data_analysis/gr-e-11.03.02.01-03.csv",
                           show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  rename(year = `Unnamed: 0`) %>%
  filter(year %in% c(2019, 2020, 2021, 2023, 2025)) %>%
  mutate(
    hybrid_total   = `conventional hybrid` + `plug-in hybrid`,
    total_vehicles = petrol + diesel + `conventional hybrid` + `plug-in hybrid` + electric + other,
    ev_pct         = (electric      / total_vehicles) * 100,
    hybrid_pct     = (hybrid_total  / total_vehicles) * 100
  ) %>%
  select(year, ev_pct, hybrid_pct) %>%
  pivot_longer(-year, names_to = "type", values_to = "percentage") %>%
  mutate(
    type   = recode(type, "ev_pct" = "Pure Electric", "hybrid_pct" = "Hybrid"),
    source = "FSO (Official)"
  )

# Bind and stack it
comparison_data_population <- bind_rows(bfs_percentage, sheds_md708_pop, sheds_history_pop) %>%
  mutate(
    source = factor(source, levels = c("FSO (Official)", "SHEDS (md_708)", "SHEDS (History)")),
    type   = factor(type,   levels = c("Hybrid", "Pure Electric", "Pure Electric (Main)", "Pure Electric (Secondary)"))
  )

comparison_totals_population <- comparison_data_population %>%
  group_by(year, source) %>%
  summarise(total_pct = sum(percentage), .groups = "drop")


p_comparison_population <- comparison_data_population %>%
  left_join(comparison_totals_population, by = c("year", "source")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = source, y = percentage, fill = type)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack", width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", percentage)),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            size = 3.5, color = "white", fontface = "bold") +
  geom_text(aes(y = total_pct, label = sprintf("%.1f%%", total_pct)),
            vjust = -0.5, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold", color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Hybrid"                    = "#FF9800",
    "Pure Electric"             = "#1B5E20",
    "Pure Electric (Main)"      = "#1B5E20",
    "Pure Electric (Secondary)" = "#81C784"
  )) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, max(comparison_totals_population$total_pct) * 1.15),
    breaks = seq(0, 20, 2),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ year, nrow = 1) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Percentage (%)", fill = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    axis.title.y       = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x        = element_text(size = 9, angle = 15, hjust = 1),
    legend.position    = "bottom",
    legend.text        = element_text(size = 16),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16)
  )

print(p_comparison_population)
save_plot(p_comparison_population, "bfs_vs_sheds_comparison_population", width = 14, height = 5)
```

New bfs file:
```{r}
fso <- read_csv("/home/amy/tmp/repos/sheds_data_scripts/src/fso_stock_vehicles.csv") %>%
  mutate(
    phev        = phev_petrol + phev_diesel,
    hev         = petrol_hev + diesel_hev,
    ev_pct      = (bev  / total) * 100,
    phev_pct    = (phev / total) * 100,
    hev_pct     = (hev  / total) * 100
  )

fso_long <- fso %>%
  filter(year %in% c(2019, 2020, 2021, 2023, 2025)) %>%
  select(year, ev_pct, phev_pct) %>%
  pivot_longer(-year, names_to = "type", values_to = "percentage") %>%
  mutate(
    type   = recode(type, "ev_pct" = "Pure Electric", "phev_pct" = "Hybrid"),
    source = "FSO (Official)"
  )

comparison_data_2 <- bind_rows(fso_long, sheds_md708_pop, sheds_history_pop) %>%
  mutate(
    source = factor(source, levels = c("FSO (Official)", "SHEDS (md_708)", "SHEDS (History)")),
    type   = factor(type,   levels = c("Hybrid", "Pure Electric", "Pure Electric (Main)", "Pure Electric (Secondary)"))
  )

comparison_totals_2 <- comparison_data_2 %>%
  group_by(year, source) %>%
  summarise(total_pct = sum(percentage), .groups = "drop")

p_comparison <- comparison_data_2 %>%
  left_join(comparison_totals_2, by = c("year", "source")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = source, y = percentage, fill = type)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack", width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", percentage)),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            size = 3.5, color = "white", fontface = "bold") +
  geom_text(aes(y = total_pct, label = sprintf("%.1f%%", total_pct)),
            vjust = -0.5, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold", color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Hybrid"                    = "#FF9800",
    "Pure Electric"             = "#1B5E20",
    "Pure Electric (Main)"      = "#1B5E20",
    "Pure Electric (Secondary)" = "#81C784"
  )) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, max(comparison_totals_2$total_pct) * 1.15),
    breaks = seq(0, 20, 2),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ year, nrow = 1) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Percentage of car owners (%)", fill = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    axis.title.y       = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x        = element_text(size = 9, angle = 15, hjust = 1),
    legend.position    = "bottom",
    legend.text        = element_text(size = 16),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16)
  )

print(p_comparison)
save_plot(p_comparison, "bfs_vs_sheds_comparison_clean_csv", width = 14, height = 5)


```

Print comparison data:
```{r}
fso_counts <- fso %>%
  filter(year %in% c(2019, 2020, 2021, 2023, 2025)) %>%
  select(year, bev, phev, total) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(bev, phev), names_to = "type", values_to = "count") %>%
  mutate(
    type       = recode(type, "bev" = "Pure Electric", "phev" = "Hybrid"),
    source     = "FSO (Official)",
    denominator = total
  ) %>%
  select(year, type, source, count, denominator)

# --- SHEDS md_708 counts ---
sheds_md708_counts <- md_708_summary %>%
  filter(year %in% c(2019, 2020, 2021, 2023, 2025)) %>%
  left_join(results_stata %>% select(year, n_car_owners), by = "year") %>%
  mutate(
    type        = "Pure Electric",
    source      = "SHEDS (md_708)",
    count       = n_ev_md708,
    denominator = n_car_owners
  ) %>%
  select(year, type, source, count, denominator)


sheds_history_counts <- results_stata %>%
  filter(year %in% c(2019, 2020, 2021, 2023, 2025)) %>%
  mutate(n_hybrid_total = n_hybrid_gas + n_hybrid_diesel) %>%
  select(year, n_ev_main, n_ev_secondary, n_hybrid_total, n_car_owners) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(n_ev_main, n_ev_secondary, n_hybrid_total),
               names_to = "type", values_to = "count") %>%
  mutate(
    type        = recode(type,
                         "n_ev_main"      = "Pure Electric (Main)",
                         "n_ev_secondary" = "Pure Electric (Secondary)",
                         "n_hybrid_total" = "Hybrid"),
    source      = "SHEDS (History)",
    denominator = n_car_owners
  ) %>%
  select(year, type, source, count, denominator)


bind_rows(fso_counts, sheds_md708_counts, sheds_history_counts) %>%
  mutate(
    percentage = round((count / denominator) * 100, 2),
    source     = factor(source, levels = c("FSO (Official)", "SHEDS (md_708)", "SHEDS (History)")),
    type       = factor(type,   levels = c("Hybrid", "Pure Electric", "Pure Electric (Main)", "Pure Electric (Secondary)"))
  ) %>%
  arrange(year, source, type) %>%
  kable(
    col.names   = c("Year", "Type", "Source", "Count", "Total (denom.)", "Pct (%)"),
    align       = "rlrrrr",
    format.args = list(big.mark = ",")
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  collapse_rows(columns = c(1, 3), valign = "top")
```


Make csv:
```{r}
sheds_counts <- results_stata %>%
  filter(year %in% c(2019, 2020, 2021, 2023, 2025)) %>%
  mutate(n_hybrid_total = n_hybrid_gas + n_hybrid_diesel) %>%
  left_join(
    md_708_summary %>% select(year, n_ev_md708),
    by = "year"
  ) %>%
  select(
    year,
    # denominators
    n_total,
    n_car_owners,
    n_car_owner_population,
    # md_708 source
    n_ev_md708,
    # history source
    n_ev_main,
    n_ev_secondary,
    n_ev_total,
    n_hybrid_gas,
    n_hybrid_diesel,
    n_hybrid_total
  )

print(sheds_counts)

write_csv(sheds_counts, "../sheds_vehicle_counts.csv")
```

check:
```{r}
stata_car_history %>%
  group_by(year_wave) %>%
  summarise(
    n_respondents    = n(),
    n_returning      = sum(id %in% stata_car_history$id[stata_car_history$year_wave < year_wave]),
    n_new            = n_respondents - n_returning
  )

stata_car_history %>%
  group_by(year_wave) %>%
  summarise(
    n_respondents = n(),
    n_returning   = sum(id %in% stata_car_history$id[stata_car_history$year_wave < year_wave]),
    n_new         = n_respondents - n_returning,
    n_car_owners  = sum(mob2_1 >= 1 & mob2_1 < 90, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_no_car      = n_respondents - n_car_owners,
    pct_car_owners = round(n_car_owners / n_respondents * 100, 1)
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    results_stata %>% select(year, n_car_owners) %>% rename(n_car_owners_stata = n_car_owners),
    by = c("year_wave" = "year")
  ) %>%
  mutate(match = n_car_owners == n_car_owners_stata) %>%
  kable(
    col.names = c("Year", "N Respondents", "N Returning", "N New",
                  "N Car Owners", "N No Car", "% Car Owners",
                  "N Car Owners (results_stata)", "Match"),
    align = "r",
    format.args = list(big.mark = ",")
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE)
```
